PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/client/'; then cd /Users/namgwangmin/Desktop/gyeongjo-ai/client && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/server/'; then cd /Users/namgwangmin/Desktop/gyeongjo-ai/server && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/client/'; then cd /Users/namgwangmin/Desktop/gyeongjo-ai/client && npx eslint "$FILE" --no-warn-ignored 2>&1 | tail -15; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/server/'; then cd /Users/namgwangmin/Desktop/gyeongjo-ai/server && npx eslint "$FILE" --no-warn-ignored 2>&1 | tail -15; fi; fi

PreToolUse.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|drop\s+table|git\s+clean\s+-f)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다. 정말 실행하시겠습니까?' >&2; exit 1; fi
